sentence: 记者发稿前需要核实所有信息的真实性。
pinyin: Jì zhě fā gǎo qián xū yào hé shí suǒ yǒu xìn xī de zhēn shí xìng.
english: Reporters need to verify the accuracy of all information before filing a story.

sentence: 很多歌迷在场外等着见偶像。
pinyin: Hěn duō gē mí zài chǎng wài děng zhe jiàn ǒu xiàng.
english: Many fans waited outside the venue hoping to see their idol.

sentence: 合唱团的每位团员都认真备战了这次演出。
pinyin: Héchànɡtuán de měi wèi tuányuán dōu rènzhēn bèizhànle zhè cì yǎnchū.
english: Every member of the choir prepared seriously for this performance.

meaning: 1. special duty; 2. assigned full time to a task
sentence: 学校聘请了一位专职心理辅导老师。
pinyin: Xuéxiào pìnqǐng le yī wèi zhuān zhí xīnlǐ fǔdǎo lǎoshī.
english: The school hired a full-time counseling teacher.

sentence: 新技术帮助农民大幅增产。
pinyin: Xīn jì shù bāng zhù nóng mín dà fú zēng chǎn.
english: The new technology helped farmers significantly increase production.
